Teams

Group employees into teams. Drag an employee onto a team to assign them — the same employee (for example an email-sender agent) can belong to multiple teams. Remove them with the ✕ on a chip, or by dragging back to All employees. Operations stay within a single team.

🗂️ All employees
Drag anyone into one or more teams. Drop here to remove from a team.
No employees yet
🏢 Teams

No teams yet.

⚙️ Unassigned operations
Tasks, assignments and flows with no team. Drag one onto a team its employee belongs to.
Every operation is assigned 🎉

📌 Boards

Pin sessions, chats, tasks, flows, assignments, agents & managers you're actively working on. Add notes and checklists, and ask "Where was I?".

Board AI

agent runs can take a minute or two

Pin to board

🛰️ Insights

AI-generated views that summarize and prioritize work across your enabled boards. Read-only — you choose the boards and focus; the assistant writes the briefing.

Loading insights…

This built-in insight always covers every enabled board. You can rename it and set a focus prompt, but its board membership is locked.

✨ Design insights with AI

Suggestions group your enabled boards into useful views, with reasoning. Create one directly or customize it first.
🛰️ Studying your boards and drafting insight ideas…

Tasks

Create, edit, run, and monitor agent tasks: status, schedule, next/last run, and history.

No tasks matched your filter.

✨ Design with AI

Creative, ready-to-run Tasks & Flows built from your existing agents. Try them out, save the keepers into your standard Tasks/Flows, or pin ideas for later.

Suggestions will feature — as the sole agent in tasks, or as a step in flows.
💡 Suggestions
Click ✨ Suggest to have AI propose new things to run, combining your agents in ways you may not have considered.
Reviewing your agents and tasks…

Flows

Wire tasks together into a conditional pipeline. When a task finishes, each outgoing flow rule is evaluated (status, output expression, or AI judgment) and matching downstream tasks run automatically.

No flows yet. Create one to orchestrate tasks conditionally.

Assignments

Manager assignments — orchestrated prompts that chain multiple agents together.

No assignments matched your filter. Click ＋ New Assignment to create one.

Water cooler

Talk to managers today, keep notes with agents, and keep persistent conversations in one place.

⚙️ Settings

Cloud sync, path profiles, system configuration, and external connections.

Optional inbound channel for external callers. The mobile relay below works without it.

📱 Mobile Relay

The mobile app connects through the Azure relay. Devices are authorized via the Connected Users below (use the 📱 button to pair). Mobile traffic appears in the Live Log, Sessions, and History tabs.

Paired devices active
Messages relayed
Last message
Last contact

Rate Limiting

Max Messages / User / Minute
Max Total Messages / Minute
Session Idle Timeout (min)

👥 Connected Users

External callers must be listed here. Share teams, agents, managers, tasks, assignments & flows on a per-user basis — admins get everything. Granting a team cascades to everything in it; you can add or exclude individual resources on top. Address agents/managers via @name, run tasks/assignments/flows via /run name.

No users configured. All inbound messages are rejected until at least one user is added.

Devices and callers that have reached this system over the mobile relay, Service Bus, or CLI — with their last activity.

⚙️ Settings

Cloud sync, path profiles, system configuration, and external connections.

🎨 Appearance

Choose how the dashboard looks. "System" follows your operating system setting.

💬 Chat

Applies to every agent and manager conversation. Both are on by default.

Reasoning & steps shows the model's thinking and tool calls inline. Live updates polls faster while a response streams.

🧠 Models

Pick which Copilot model powers each kind of work. These apply everywhere — manual runs, schedules, triggers, chat and manager orchestration. A per-agent model override (if set on an agent) always wins. Leave a category on Runtime default to use Copilot's default model.

Ad-hoc agent & manager conversations (SPA and mobile).

Scheduled/triggered agent runs, tasks, flow steps and manager sub-agents.

The manager "brain" and flow AI condition/judge evaluators.

✅ Saved.

⤴ Default Export Repository

Pre-fill the Export to AzDO dialog with this Azure DevOps target. Enter the org & project, click Connect, then pick the repository & branch. When set, opening Export auto-connects and preselects them — you can still override per-export.

✅ Saved.

☁️ Cloud Sync

Each machine backs up its own agents, managers, tasks and event config to its own cloud namespace. Every machine runs its own schedules and responds to its own events independently.

Your config syncs automatically to this machine's own namespace. To borrow agents from another machine, use Browse Other Machines.

Advanced — manual sync

Sync happens automatically. Push forces an immediate backup of this machine's config to the cloud. Restore overwrites this machine's local config from its own latest cloud backup — use only for disaster recovery.

🖥️ Connected Machines

All machines running this app and sharing this cloud config. Each runs its own schedules and events; your mobile device chooses which one to listen to.

No machines registered yet…

🧰 Browse Other Machines

Each machine keeps its own agents and managers in the cloud. Install any of them into this machine's namespace to reuse them here.

No other machines have published a config yet…

⤴ Export to Azure DevOps

Serialize (agent definition, MCP servers, and skills) and push it to a new branch. Secret values in MCP env are rewritten to ${VAR} placeholders before anything leaves this machine.

Repository

🚌 Configure Service Bus

Optional inbound channel. Connect an Azure Service Bus queue to let external systems address your agents. The mobile relay works independently.

Namespace (Azure AD auth — recommended)
Connection String (alternative to namespace)
🔒 Stored securely (masked)
Inbound Queue
Reply Queue

🔑 Manage access —

Grant whole teams (cascades to every employee & operation inside) and/or individual resources. Use Exclude to carve a single resource out of a team grant.

Teams (grant cascades to everything inside)

Name
Description
Backing TemplateThe built-in manager agent that provides this manager's orchestration brain.
Manage templates →
Manager Templates
Built-in agents that back your managers. View, create, edit, and remove the orchestration brains. A template in use by a manager can't be removed.
Must keep RUN_AGENT, COMPLETE and REQUEST_AGENT — the manager decision parser depends on them.

Auto: parent of server directory
Loading discovery results…
Connect to an Azure DevOps organization and project, pick a repository and branch, then install agents and plugins discovered under any .github folder. Reinstall re-fetches from the same repo/branch. Auth uses your signed-in Azure CLI — no token to enter.

Manager agents orchestrate other agents. They can monitor, analyze, and chain agent outputs.
Template: manager:manager
